datasets.title: MCI Facial Expression Dataset
datasets.description: A facial expression dataset for mild cognitive impairment research, organized by subject folders and designed for affective computing and cognitive-health related analysis. The collection supports subject-level modeling and expression recognition experiments, and is curated around seven emotion categories for studying emotion perception and behavioral response patterns in MCI-related settings.

datasets.title: MECO: A Multimodal Dataset for Emotion and Cognitive Understanding in Older Adults
datasets.description: MECO is a multimodal dataset for emotion and cognitive understanding in older adults. It contains data from 42 participants, about 38 hours of synchronized video, audio, EEG, and ECG recordings, with annotations for valence, arousal, basic emotions, and cognitive scores. The dataset is designed to support affective computing, cognitive assessment, and early MCI-related research in aging populations.

datasets.title: VR Stroop Eye-Tracking Dataset for Lightweight MCI Detection
datasets.description: This dataset supports the CogSci paper "KWS-TA-CNN Network: Towards Lightweight Mild Cognitive Impairment Detection Using Eye-Tracking Signals From Virtual Reality Stroop Test." It contains eye-tracking signals collected during a virtual reality Stroop test and is designed for lightweight mild cognitive impairment detection, cognitive-health screening research, and efficient temporal-attention modeling.
